entities.name: SESAME
entities.description: The target crop of the study, Sesamum indicum L.

entities.name: GENETIC DISTANCE ANALYSIS
entities.description: The analysis used for the selection of suitable parents based on genetic divergence

entities.name: HETEROSIS
entities.description: The phenomenon of hybrid superiority over parents

entities.name: SSR
entities.description: Simple Sequence Repeat molecular markers used for genetic distance estimation

entities.name: GDSSR
entities.description: Genetic distance estimated using SSR markers

entities.name: SEED-STORAGE PROTEIN PROFILING
entities.description: The process of analyzing seed-storage proteins to estimate genetic distance

entities.name: GDSDS
entities.description: Genetic distance estimated using seed-storage protein profiling

entities.name: AGRO-MORPHOLOGICAL TRAITS
entities.description: Physical and growth characteristics used to estimate genetic distance

entities.name: GDMOR
entities.description: Genetic distance estimated using agro-morphological traits

entities.name: HYBRID PERFORMANCE
entities.description: The overall performance and yield of the generated F1 hybrids

entities.name: COMBINING ABILITY ANALYSIS
entities.description: The analysis used to evaluate the ability of parents to produce superior offspring

entities.name: HALF DIALLEL
entities.description: A mating design used to generate crosses for combining ability analysis

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The amount of seed produced per plant, used as a primary performance metric

entities.name: BETTER-PARENT HETEROSIS
entities.description: Heterosis calculated as the superiority of the hybrid over the better parent

entities.name: MID-PARENT HETEROSIS
entities.description: Heterosis calculated as the superiority of the hybrid over the average of the two parents

entities.name: SPECIFIC COMBINING ABILITY
entities.description: The deviation of the hybrid performance from the expected value based on general combining ability

entities.name: PER SE PERFORMANCE
entities.description: The actual observed performance of the hybrids

entities.name: PARENTAL DIVERGENCE
entities.description: The degree of genetic difference between the selected parents
